GeneralBoatDescription: ['As spirited as she is beautiful, this 2006 Back Cove 26 is known for its classic "Downeast" style design with a cherry interior, V-berth, dinette, and typically featuring a single Yanmar diesel engine; considered a reliable and comfortable cruiser for coastal cruising and fishing excursions.  She is a classic Downeast-style cruiser known for its efficient, single diesel engine performance and high-quality build. \xa0The style and grace of the Maine lobster boat has been admired by boating enthusiasts the world over; no builder blends the classical looks with modern construction better than Back Cove Yachts. \xa0\xa0Orion is ready to launch for your next adventure on the water. \xa0The hull and the bottom was repainted in April of 2024 and the canvas top was replaced in 2023. \xa0Service Records available. \xa0']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['The Back Cove 37 continues the practical features that have identified the Back Cove range of down east style motor yachts: Usability, low maintenance and fuel efficiency.In the master stateroom there is an island berth for ease of egress, and for stowage of owner’s gear, there are many lockers and drawers provided. To starboard aft of the master is a full guest cabin with a pullman berth and ample storage capacity. Opposite and to port is a large head unit with separate stall shower.Between the lower and salon sole levels, the mid-galley is fully equipped with a refrigerator, freezer, microwave oven and deep stainless steel sink as well as many drawers and lockers for galley storage. Large windows overhead provide the galley with ample visibility and light.In the salon twin Stidd helm seats are provided for the helmsman and crew. Aft of the helm is an L-shaped settee and to port a two person love seat. An elegant inlaid table offers a comfortable space for dining with crew and guests. Large windows offer plenty of light and air while overhead a large sliding pilot hatch allows air to flow through the salon. At the aft end of the main salon large swing-bi-fold doors completely open up the salon to the cockpit. At the transom, fixed seating will provide the comfort you desire for socializing with guests.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['The 2022 Back Cove 372 is a popular single-engine Downeast-style cruiser known for its classic aesthetics, comfortable ride, and practical features. It\'s an updated version of the highly successful Back Cove 37, incorporating feedback from owners and leveraging new technology. \xa0The 372 is designed for couples or families seeking a comfortable, well-built cruiser for coastal adventures, blending traditional Downeast appeal with modern amenities and improved technology.This is a dealer owned boat, all ready for your family\'s next coastal adventure.']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Key Features and Highlights Design and Construction:  Maintains the elegant and timeless Downeast lines of its predecessor. Hull is modified-V forward with camber from bow to transom for a soft ride. Built with durable construction, including PVC foam-cored hull bottom and resin-infused foam-core stringer system. Prop resides in a tunnel, partially protected by a keel, skeg, and rudder, resulting in a reasonable 3-foot-7-inch draft.  Performance:  Powered by a single Volvo Penta D8 diesel engine 600 HP @ 3000 RPM w/ Volvo 7" display Offers a smooth and quiet ride, capable of a wide-open speed around 33 mph and a fast cruise of 26.5 mph. Good fuel efficiency, with a reported range of 340 miles at cruising speed. Equipped with a standard Side-Power bow thruster (SE100) and a stern thruster for easy handling, especially for couples.  Interior and Accommodations:  Layout: Two cabins, a salon table that converts to an additional berth, a head with a separate shower, and a fully equipped mid-level galley. Master Stateroom: Cherry-paneled with an island queen berth. Guest Stateroom: Offers a double berth, also suitable for additional storage. Head: Reconfigured with an expanded medicine cabinet, sizeable over-sink mirror, and redesigned shower stall. Galley: Features an induction cooktop, AC/DC stainless steel drawer-type fridge/freezer, microwave, and ample storage. Salon: Comfortable seating for seven, with a flip-down LCD TV and XM-friendly stereo system. Visibility: Large tri-pane windshield with glare-reducing black mullions, fixed-glazed pilothouse windows (replacing sliding windows for enhanced sightlines), and a center-opening windshield.  Updates and New Features (compared to the original Back Cove 37):  Electrical System: Upgraded to a more efficient 24V DC system, reducing copper weight and increasing run time for thrusters. Helm: Redesigned with a black windshield liner and upholstered helm pod to reduce glare, and increased space for navigation electronics. Cockpit: New aft-facing cockpit seat to starboard with a folding armrest and drink holder, and a new salon door to port with a bi-fold window. Bow Thruster: Upgraded to a SidePower SE100 for greater control. ', 'Vessel OptionsInterior OceanAir blinds on sliding windows and salon door Vitrofrigo DW180 Fridge/fridge in lieu of standard fridge/freezer Vitrofrigo DRW70A All-in-One Drawer fridge-freezer in storage space below helm Interior Fabrics - Upgraded to Ultraleather (color White Water) Cockpit Seating in Ultraleather (color Tempotest Positano) Helm Chair in Ultraleather (color White Water)Electronics Garmin 8616xsv Transducer VHF Radio & Antenna Autopilot RadarElectrical Ignition protected stern thruster 3000-Watt inverterMechanical Electric Power Steering (EPS) Cummins Generator (37 hrs.) Fresh water washdown in anchor locker Raw water washdown fore and aft Oil changing system Power center windowExterior & Deck Hull Gel Coat -Back Cove White Boot Stripe - Dark Blue Cove Stripe – Gold Removeable hardtop mast w/ fixed base plate Removeable teak cockpit table (triangle shaped) with P&S mounting locations Shore water inlet in cockpit SureShade SilentGlide cockpit awning system', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['The Nordic Tug 32 is a fuel efficient cruising vessel featuring classic Nordic Tug styling. She is built in the USA and is equipped with a standard 280 Volvo diesel engine. As with all Nordic Tugs, the 32 has a semi-displacement hull built with hand-laid heavily reinforced fiberglass with full keel and hard chine, giving her exceptional stability and handling qualities. Convenient port and starboard pilot house doors adds to the ease of captain\'s operation especially when navigating locks and docking. This very popular cruising vessel features a roomy salon/galley and separate pilothouse with a 360 degree view and 6\'8" headroom. Forward is a spacious stateroom with head and large separate stall shower. The roomy salon has a large settee that converts into an oversized double berth. All Nordic Tugs hulls come standard with an incredible 10-year hull warranty.\xa0']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['\xa0"HOP ABOARD" is an exceptional 2015 model Grand Banks 43 Europa. Loaded with options, All maintenance up to date by Cummins. No expense has been spared and maintained with a open checkbook. She is in exceptional condition and will satisfy the most scrutinizing buyer / surveyor both mechanically and cosmetically. No known issues...No Disappointment\'s !Upgrades and Features: Twin Cummins QSB 6.7L 480hp diesel engines with Zeus Drives. 1698 Hours Skyhook Activation: Cummins "Skyhook" GPS interface with engine Garmin electronics SAT HD TV, Watermaker - Newport 400 MK, Optional Upgrade Water purification system - Seagull microbiological IV x - 1F purifier with faucet, in galley Generator: Onan 11.5kW. 1982 Hours Recently added Invertor \xa0Glendinning Cablemaster Windlass: Maxwell Model HRC 10 windlass, vertical gypsy and drum, (2) stations, DC Anchor: Lewmar Delta with 220\' - 3/8" galvanized chain, 44 lb. Canvas package: forward deck settee, flybridge port and starboard settees, table, console, helm seats; Sunbrella "Toast" Strataglass enclosure with zippers for five\xa0openings Helm seats: (2) Bluewater Yachtline series, with retractable footrest multi-zone Fusion stereo Washer/Dryer: Splendide W/D 2100 vented combo unit Sub Zero refrigeration Underwater lights: (4) Aqualuma white Tender: Rigid 10 Sport with 30hp Evinrude E-Tec Motor, E30DPSLAB center console tender Crane: UMT E800 aluminum crane with chocks, cleats and base plates granite countertops Ghost video security system and much more.The Grand Banks 43 Europa is the successor to the popular Grand Banks 41 Europa, with the addition of the second head and added space in the salon and cockpit. One of the most popular features of the 43 EU is the large utility room with ample storage space and washer/dryer. Power is provided by twin Cummins 480s, offering speeds to 20 knots and good fuel economy for displacement-speed cruising. The precision joystick control provides great handling at the dock, and the sky-hook option will hold the vessel in place at bridge openings, or if single handling, gives the captain the option to put out lines and fenders without having to return to the helm.The Grand Banks 43 Europa model is in high demand, and this is a great opportunity to purchase a Beautiful Grand Banks 43 that\'s ready to cruise!']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Walkthrough\xa0"HOP ABOARD" offers a very spacious aft deck with beautiful cockpit high gloss Teak table with polished stainless steel pedestal and Navy cover with two (2) folding Teak deck chairs. Access the flybridge via a staircase to port forward, at the center is the large engine room deck hatch with ladder. Her comfortable wide sidedecks with strong and high stainless steel rails offer easy transit from bow to stern. Enter the salon from the sliding door on the aft deck. There is an L-settee aft to port with a Grand Banks yacht table with fold-up leaves. There is a straight settee to starboard with a hideaway TV on electric lift behind. The lower helm is forward with fixed helmseat and access below to the utility room with combo washer/dryer, freezer and a great amount of additional storage space. Across from the helm and to port is the fully equipped Galley with convection/microwave, 3-burner Ceran cooktop, two (2) fridge drawers, dedicated storage for silverware and overhead drop-down dish storage lockers, plentiful lockers and drawers for food storage and more.Accommodations are down four (4) steps with the Master Stateroom forward and Guest Stateroom to port. The private Master Stateroom features an Island Queen berth with storage drawers beneath, hanging locker, additional storage drawers and night table. The en suite master head has a separate stall shower. The Guest Stateroom is large, open and airy and features twin large single berths, hanging locker and access to the head from the stateroom. This Guest/Day Head is also accessed from the companionway.The flybridge offers a full Bimini top, full navigational station with two (2) Pompanette helm seats, L-settee and Teak table to starboard, additional seating to port with storage below, plentiful storage compartments, 800-lb. Steelhead davit and a Rigid 10 Sport tender w/ 30hp Evinrude E-Tec Motor. GeneralBoatDescription: ['Carolina Girl is a prime example of a hardcore fishing yacht built to provide the utmost comfortability and performance. This Hatteras is as custom as they come and has been maintained by a family that understands what it takes that is required to fish on a competitive circuit. Carolina Girl has a open check book policy and some of the most recent upgrades include but not limited to a fresh 1000hr service, custom built mezzanine with refrigeration installed by Croswait Marine in addition to a transom fish box that is able to hold the days best catch, new after cooler cores, shafts, Garmin electronics package and much more!\xa0 Carolina Girl is HANDS down the most upgraded/custom driest riding 54 Hatteras ever built! Only on her second owner and has custom lifting strakes installed by Croswait Custom Composite. Schedule a showing today to view this unique 54 Hatteras!\xa0 Call now, this 54 Hatteras will not last! Call with trades & offers!']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Manufacturer Provided DescriptionThe Hatteras 54 Convertible is designed specifically to deliver a smooth ride and excellent handling while operating at high speed. The convexity in the hull bottom helps make this hull immensely strong. The slight outward curvature (viewed from keel to chine) reduces impact accelerations and contributes to an incredibly smooth head-sea ride. The 54 is designed for serious sportfishing. The cockpit boasts a bait and tackle center with sink, cutting board and tackle drawers; a bait freezer; storage console with drawers, four rod holders; a removable, full-size in-deck fish box with macerator and an amply proportioned transom door. Inside, the salon/galley provides an L-shaped sofa and entertainment center. The entertainment center features a TV, AM/FM surround sound stereo receiver with DVD/CD player and VCR. The fully equipped galley offers natural wood cabinets, four-burner cooktop, garbage disposal and sub-zero style freezer and refrigerator drawer units. The microwave/convection oven is cleverly concealed by the cabinet door. This handsome galley is also practical ? the Amitco vinyl strip flooring resembles teak but is almost effortless to maintain. Galley storage is awesome with six exceptionally deep drawers. The chart flat area provides additional storage and is easily accessed via two cleverly designed deep drawers in the aft galley backsplash. Convenient, eye-level bulkhead access to this area offers even more storage opportunities within easy reach of the galley and dinette. The master stateroom features a queen berth with cedar-lined storage underneath, air conditioning disbursement through fluted wood valances for uniform comfort, and a concealed pocket access door for privacy. The entertainment center includes an LCD screen TV and AM/FM stereo receiver and CD player. The private master head includes a stall shower with seat, solid surface countertops, and easy-care Amtico vinyl strip flooring.', '2023 UpgradesStarLink Installed New Sub-Zero Over Under Fridge New Carpet ElectroSea Installed Three Dometic Split A/C Units Replaced 1000 hr service including valve adjustment, cooling system flushed (heat exchangers & after coolers), engine service &gear service New Veem wheels New Shafts Cutlass Bearings Shaft Seals Rudder Seals Windlass \xa0', '2022 UpgradesCustom Transom Fish Box Built & Installed by Croswait Marine Custom Built Tackle Station Zip Wakes Installed to Increase Performance & Reliability', '2021 UpgradesNew Refrigeration Pumps \xa0', '2020 UpgradesCustom Mezzanine with Refrigeration & Drink Boxes New Antennas', '2019 Upgrades(3) 16" Garmins New Garmin Open Array Radar Garmin Temp Sensor New Icom M605 VHF\'s New Curtains New Fusion Stereo System with JL Audio speakers', '2018 UpgradesAfter Cooler Cores Replaced', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['Major Price Reduction 07/01/25\xa0Plus a $5,000.00 commission bonus paid directly to selling broker upon closing!Captain owned, 2nd owner, beautiful and well maintained Horizon Power Catamaran with impeccable service records. \xa0This luxurious Horizon PC52 foot is designed for spacious comfort, efficiency and is blue water capable for extended offshore cruising and her 4\'4" draft makes her perfect for Coastal Florida, the Caribbean and beyond.The custom day head installed on the flybridge separates this PC52 from the rest of the fleet and provides convenience and safety for skipper and/or guests alike.Quintessa is priced to sell and ready to set sail for her next adventure. \xa0Located in the Tampa Bay/Sand Key Islands.See walk through video in this listing..........']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['AccommodationsSalon Wood floors w/ custom fitted removable carpet\xa0 Salon Seating with coffee table Cocktail & barware cabinet Desk with chair Electric TV Lift Hunter Douglas electric shades Two ventilating hatchesGalley/ Dinette Wood floors Corian countertops 3 S/S Swivel Stools SubZero Fridge with dual freezer drawers GE 4 burner cooktop GE Avantium oven/convection microwave Fischer Paykel dishwasher Oversized S/S sink with pull out faucet and disposal Bright wooden cabinetry with ample storage for cutlery, crockery and much more.VIP stateroom: Night stands with light/HVAC control and outlets Abundant storage with large hanging closet Wood floors (carpeted) Hunter Douglas blinds Deck Hatch (screened/blackout) Samsung TV (new 2023)Port Aft guest stateroom: Twin berths w/storage under Carpeted Hunter douglas blinds Full length hanging closet Cabin lights Opening port lights Stacked Washer & DryerMaster Stateroom Queen berth Night stands with light/HVAC control and outlets Abundant storage with full length hanging and linen closets Wood floors (carpeted) Hunter Douglas blinds Deck Hatch (screened/blackout) Samsung TV (new 2023)Heads and Showers General 2 x Walk in showers (Grohe fixtures) Corian countertops Abundant storage Vacuflush toilets (x2); Dometic (flybridge) Medicine Cabinets Portlights for ventilation Extractor fan', 'Navigation & Instrumentation 2 x Furuno 15” T2 touch screen chart plotter with GPS antenna on Flybridge. Furuno Auto pilot on Flybridge and Salon. (NEW auto pilot controller installed on flybridge helm chair) Furuno 4kw 3.5ft open array radar. 2 x Furuno DST800 Depth transducers. Icom IC-M504 VHF on flybridge. ACR RCI 100D Spotlight on Flybridge FLIR Thermal/Night Vision Camera 8ft Digital Antenna for VHF/AIS Furuno Class B AIS Transponder Furuno FDF Fishfinder Garmin GC10 Marine Engine room Cameras x 2 3 x Axis all weather Security Cameras connected to Elan System Sirius XM Module and Antenna JL Audio Sub woofer & 4 x 7” JL Audio Speakers on Flybridge 2 x JL Audio Sub Woofers and 4 x JL Audio 7" speakers on Aft Deck Cisco Linksys router in Salon 40” Samsung LED TV in Salon 32” Samsung LED TV in Master 32” Samsung LED TV in VIP 32” Samsung TV on Aft Deck KVH HD7 Satellite TV (not activated) with Dummy Dome Sat TV displays on Flybridge APC Alternate Power Supply', 'Additional Equipment Full Bow Deck Cushions 1800 Gal/day Water-maker Sea recovery\xa0 Fresh water UV Sterilization system V-Kool on all windows Spur Line Cutters Burnewiin Rod Holder system Dual X-Caliber Water pumps Covers for aft deck seating, aft deck table and flybridge Table', 'Flybridge Helm Station with Single STIDD helm chair with built in custom autopilot steering + SS wheel; Helm Seat Cover First Mate Lounge/Sunning Bed Lounge couch with ample storage under + Teak cocktail table Wet bar with sink (hot/cold); Corian Countertop Table + 4 cushioned SS swivel stools Custom Day Head w/ Dometic 27" LYNX Pro SS 48K BTU BBQ 1 x DC Fridge 800lb Steelhead Crane Ample locker space Non-skid cambered deck with drainage Infinity carpet FRP Hardtop Flag staff Ample locker space for storage Covers for F/B Seating and console New Custom Day Head\xa0', 'Deck and Ground Tackle New triple Kahlenberg horns on hard top Teak covered aft deck, Steps to flybridge & Steps to transom. S/S rub rail around hull deck joint Heavy-duty S/S #316 1-1/4² handrail w/1”( stanchions) 10 Mooring cleats on deck. Fuel and water inlets. Locker for 24V anchor windlass. Fresh water washdown for anchor. Fresh water washdown on aft deck Ultra anchor 150ft of high tensile 3/8” chain and 150ft warp. Roller for anchor. Anchor Bridle Doors, hatches, windows & port holes SS sliding salon door. Two bow storage lockers with access through flush FRP deck hatches 2 x Deck hatches with blinds & screens Engine access through manual deck hatches in cockpit floor with manual struts Two large hull side frameless window Six oval portholes. Aft Deck Area FRP Curved seat with cushions at aft deck Teak cockpit table. Comfortable stairs from aft deck to flybridge Two steps down to dive/swim platform Cockpit lockers for storage 2 side boarding doors Second location bases for aft deck table S/S transom door with Horizon Logo Dimmer switch for aft. deck ceiling lighting Swimming platform area Built-in shower with hot/cold water Swim ladder on STBD side S/S safety rail on swim platformLighting LED courtesy lights LED bulwark w/ flush mounted deck lights LED ceiling lights LED white light with 24VDC transformer on Horizon group logo in P&S Wiring for boat name on transom New LED navigation lights at mast (2023) Cockpit down lights. 2 X Aft Docking Flood lights 4 x Aqualuma Underwater Lights', 'Engine Room Cummins Onan 17.5kw generator\xa0 Racor 900FG filters for both engines One oil change pump for engines, generator and gearboxes Fresh water system 300 Gal of water tanks integral to hull Color coded piping for easy identification Marine grade lines for fresh water system One 17 Gal/110V or 220V water heater 2 x High volume 24V Headhunter Xcaliber fresh water pump with accumulator tank Sanitary system Electric fresh water flush toilets, pumps with Y valve for automatic discharge. and dock side pump out (2) Bilge water system 4x electric 24V bilge pumps High level bilge water alarm. GeneralBoatDescription: ['This vessel will be in Fort Lauderdale during the 2025 Fort Lauderdale International Boat Show. US FLAGGED.This meticulously maintained Horizon PC65 is one of the most unique builds that Horizon Power Catamarans has ever produced. The 4 stateroom, 5 head, PC65 is equipped with an on-deck master/full beam stateroom and fully enclosed Skylounge/Pilothouse flybridge with internal stairs. The twin CAT C12-9 diesel motors, pushing 2000HP combined, make this PC one of the fastest in the fleet, cruising at 25 MPH and top speed of 30MPH. Very low hours on both engines.Recent upgrades include:\xa0\xa0 Brand new Termodinamica A/C system\xa0(August 2024)\xa0 Teak sanded and treated (August 2024)\xa0 Full top to bottom ceramic coating (August 2024)\xa0 New paint in all bilges and engine room (September 2024)\xa0 Complete engine service (October 2024)\xa0']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['SpecificationsExterior Deck and EquipmentHydraulic Hi-Lo swim platform.Stainless steel framed salon door with 8’\xa0opening.Teak aft deck. Other area is in non-skid deck.Aft deck engine control station on Port and Starboard.Aft deck bar with corian top, basin, fridge, and Scotsman icemaker.Large, solid\xa0High Gloss finished\xa0wood cockpit table.Foredeck Cushions with Collapsible Bimini Top.New Bow cushions (September 2024)Full Ceramic Coating (October 2024)\xa0High pressure wash down systemFlybridge\xa0Boat DeckWet bar with\xa0corian top,\xa0Gageneau Electric Grill and Storage2 Life rafts1500lb hydraulic crane for tender on flybridge. (Service and overhaul September 2024)SkyloungeAccess via internal stairs from salon to skylounge.Interior wood finish.Stainless steel French door to boat deck.Air conditioning.Day head.Bar with Fridge DrawersDrop down TV with Sonos Sound bar.Engine Room and EquipmentSound and heat insulated compartments w/ camerasUnderwater lightsHumphree active stabilizing trim tabs2 x 21.5 kW (60Hz) Onan generators with sound\xa0shield and air water separator.1400 Gallon per day Water-makerTermodinamica Variable Speed Air Compressor VRV30 135,000BTU (August 2024)ElectroSea Eelctro Strainer system100Amp cable master.Navigation & InstrumentationGarmin\xa0GPS.Garmin\xa060”\xa04\xa0kW 96nm open array radar system.Garmin\xa08617\xa017”\xa0(x3) multifunction displays.Garmin\xa0Autopilot System\xa0with remote mounted in Stidd ArmGarmin\xa0Wind/Speed/Temp/Depth\xa0transducers.Garmin\xa0VHF\xa0at\xa0flybridge\xa0(with built-in loudhailer)\xa0and Salon/Bar.Garmin\xa0AIS transmit & receive.Icom SSB 150watt marine radioMaretron Ultrasonic WindGarmin Sirius XM receiverGarmin GSD 25 Premium Sonar moduleGarmin GT-41 CHIRP transducerGarmin PS51 Panoptix forward facing transducerPTX low light cameraLED light bars forwardLED stern lightSat phoneAudio & Video Equipment50” Samsung in Salon with Sonos Playbar42” Samsung in Master with Sonos Playbar40” Samsung in Skylounge with Sonos Playbar28” Samsung in VIP19” Samsung in Twin and 4th\xa0SteroomsApple TV in Salon, Master & SkyloungeAppliancesElectrolux (or similar) 4 burner cook top,\xa0electric.GE Avantium microwave/convection oven.GE/Miele dishwasher.LIEBHERR HCB 1560 (or similar)\xa0stainless steel refrigerator with freezer.', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. GeneralBoatDescription: ['JUST REDUCED.....EXTREMELY CLEAN, WELL MAINTAINED CAPE HORN 27 XS"Ms Stella" is a one owner, indoor rack stored Cape Horn 27 XS. Her 200 HP Yamaha\'s have been serviced every 100 hours by the same yard since new. Her gelcoat is in exceptional condition as you would expect from a boat that has been kept indoors. She has been lightly fished with most of her hours coming at trawling speeds.\xa0The Cape Horn 27 XS features a virtually unsinkable hull that is pressure filled with closed cell foam. Her sheerline is particularly distinctive and very attractive. The Cape Horn\'s cockpit is very accomodating. \xa0She sports a 42 gallon livewell and a seven foot fishbox with 700 quart capacity for the angler, and seating for 8-10 people for a day of cruising.\xa0Notable features:Forward seating with removable cushions and storage underneath plus forward floor storageAnchor and line storage forwardHardtop with additional rod holders, speakers, lighting, and storageHelm seats with flip up bostersHelm includes:\xa0 Garmin 7612 xsv, Garmin VHF 200, Fusion NRX, Lenco trim tab control, Richie compass, ACR EPIRBElectronic shift contolsTriple batteries with crossover switchesCockpit lightingFold away rear seatFresh and raw water washdownsLive well/ fish boxTackle drawersEnclosed head in the consoleTransom door and swim ladder']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['Introducing the 2022 Caymas 28 HB Twin, a remarkable saltwater fishing boat designed for enthusiasts seeking adventure on the water. With an overall length of 27.58 feet, this vessel boasts a sleek and efficient modified vee hull made from durable composite material, ensuring stability and performance in various conditions. Powered by twin 300 hp Mercury Verado outboard engines, each with only 95 hours of use, this boat promises exhilarating speed and reliability. The outboard configuration enhances maneuverability, making it ideal for both fishing expeditions and leisurely cruises. The Caymas 28 HB Twin is equipped with essential features that enhance your boating experience. Its thoughtful design ensures comfort and functionality, making it a perfect choice for those who appreciate quality craftsmanship and performance. Experience the thrill of saltwater fishing with this exceptional boat that combines power, style, and versatility.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['The Donzi 38 ZF Cuddy has been designed to offer great looks, blistering performance, and unmatched versatility. Designed with thoughtful features throughout, this offshore speed machine performs equally well whether tournament fishing, cruising, entertaining, diving, or pursuing any other activity. The 38 ZF has been finished with upscale touches throughout. The sculpted, richly-padded drop-down bolster seats at the helm would be right at home on the sportiest high performance boat. The same goes for the wraparound cockpit coaming bolsters. There?s room to stand inside the roomy console with fiberglass inner liner, where a freshwater sink, shower, and head are housed. A curved, tempered-glass console windshield offers great looks as well as protection from the wind. With its proven ventilated hull design and triple Mercury 4-stroke Verado outboards, the 38 ZF offers great speed, nimble handling and a smooth, dry ride.']

Whether you\'re chasing trophy fish or cruising at high speeds, this Donzi delivers an exhilarating ride with twin Mercury Verado 300HP engines, giving you the power and reliability you need. Whether you\'re heading offshore for a day of fishing or cruising with friends and family, this boat delivers speed, style, and performance like no other. AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Additional InformationThe newest and largest Sedan, the 441, continues that tradition. The first thing I noticed about her was not her styling, but how easy it is to get around her. Getting aboard is unchallenging, whether from the side or via the three-foot-deep swim platform. So is entering the saloon from the seven-foot-long covered cockpit, through an easy-sliding door and over a low threshold. Headed up to the bridge? The trip\'s a snap, thanks to an enclosed, molded-FRP stairway. And the passage to the foredeck will be a low-drama event even for landlubbers and little ones, thanks to nine-inch-wide side decks, 28-inch-high rails that come all the way back to the cockpit, and grabrails that run the length of the house. As for the foredeck, it\'s nearly flat and covered in aggressive nonskid, and the bowrail rises to nearly chest height to protect you when anchoring.Inside, you\'ll find a layout not only easy to move around in, but quite similar to that of the 411, the boat the 441 replaces. Only a single step divides the saloon from the galley-dinette deck, elevated to provide room for the midcabin beneath and to enhance visibility from the optional starboard-side lower helm. With 360-degree glass\xa0As for the galley, it\'s simple and efficient, with Karadon countertops, two big and deep stainless steel sinks, and a three-burner Origo stove. Both sinks and cooktop have Karadon covers to maximize workspace; the one for the latter is big, heavy, and hard to stow. It\'d be easier to handle if divided into two\xa0has port and starboard windows that really open up the area. At the foot of the stairs is a head with doors to the hallway and midcabin, making it a good day head. There\'s no enclosed shower here, just a combination faucet-shower head. The larger forepeak en suite head is about a third bigger and has an enclosed shower.\xa0\xa0\xa0The Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['This Sabre 58 astounds people when they get aboard as her lovely exterior styling belies the outstanding layout and space that is normally found on larger boats. However, the boat\'s actual size makes her ideal for a couple to enjoy cruising on their own yet offers plenty of space for adventuring with friends and family. Her Volvo IPS propulsion and Volvo Joystick not only make the boat extremely maneuverable in even the toughest docking situations, this propulsion system also provides outstanding performance with a renowned smooth and quiet ride. Her layout features three spacious cabins, each with their own ensuite heads and showers. One of the many highlights of this boat is the full-beam master cabin with its luxurious 76" X 80" island berth. And surprisingly, the VIP cabin forward is the size of a typical master cabin while the third guest cabin features twin berths that offer the option of sliding together electrically to make a queen-sized berth.\xa0The pilothouse is another highlight of this boat with the U-shaped galley located aft, providing outstanding access to both the cockpit and the large U-shaped settee forward. \xa0The helm station is laid out cleanly and neatly making for easy operation of the outstanding navigation package. Not found on many other boats in this class is proper forward-facing seating for two couples with twin Stidd seats at the helm and a double companion seat to port. This seating provides great comfort and visibility in all directions. The large frameless direct-bonded pilothouse windows contribute to the outstanding sightlines for all aboard as well as bring in great natural light.\xa0Spirit In The Sky is fully equipped with a top-notch equipment list (as seen in the listing below) and is ideal for everything from afternoon trips to extended cruising wherever an owner chooses to venture. Be assured, the ride in a seaway is comfortable and dry.The owner of Spirit In The Sky has provided only the best for the boat employing two of the top service providers for Sabre Yachts. The owner also is aboard almost every day to ensure all systems are functioning in tip-top shape. Simply put, this boat is ready to take her next owner on journeys near and far!\xa0']

Custom Curtains for Galley Windows\xa0 Custom Poseidon Blinds for Aft Enclosure Recessed into Enclosure Panels ', 'Manufacturer Provided DescriptionThe 58 Salon Express design features large windows to flood the living areas in natural light, and a main door that opens fully from port to starboard, comfortably merging exterior and interior spaces. Located aft within the pilothouse, her fully equipped galley boasts a u-shaped counter to port with cooktop, sink, and ample under-counter storage, balanced to starboard with another stretch of linear counter and storage. From there, a single step accesses the salon, and the helm deck, creating a graceful and practical social space. Below deck, the 58 Salon Express houses three cabins each with ensuite head and shower, and including an expansive, full-beam master stateroom with a walk-around king berth, a generously proportioned head and shower unit, and abundant storage.', 'Hull Modified deep “V” planing hull design. 15° deadrise at transom, 24° deadrise amidships. ISO NPG white gelcoat w/ vinyl ester resin. VIP resin infused biaxial E-glass w/ Corecell SAN foam core. Stringer system biaxial E-glass w/ foam core. Resin infused E-glass swim platform w/ molded-in anti-skid. Hull side rubbing strakes. White PVC rub rail w/ stainless steel cap. Painted (Urethane) double boot top. Gold recessed cove stripe.', 'Deck and Hardtop ISO NPG gelcoat. VIP resin infused knitted biaxial structural e-glass reinforcements w/ balsa coring. Molded-in anti-skid deck surfaces. Fixed-glazed, recessed salon windows. Hardtop w/ electric sliding sunroof & integrated shade/screen combination. Custom Sabre FRP composite radar mast w/ powder-coated aluminum platforms. Double-sided anchor lockers w/ slam latches. Access hatch from aft cockpit to engine room w/ electric/hydraulic lift. Forward-facing, center-aft cockpit seating w/ table.', 'Deck Hardware Center of transom between dual stepways to cockpit raises electric/hydraulically to provide access to large storage area/garage 1 1/2″ Diameter type 316 stainless steel perimeter rail system. (6) 12” Stainless steel cleats: two forward, four mid ship. (2) Stainless steel horn bollard cleats aft. (2) Stainless steel stern cleats. 12” Stainless steel cleat to port of windlass chain stopper as anchor rode tie off. Custom stainless steel bow pulpit w/ anchor roller. 24v electric anchor windlass w/ controls at helm & foot switches on deck. Ensign flagstaff aft. Burgee staff on the bow pulpit. Low profile stainless steel hatches w/screens. Custom stainless steel opening port lights. Teak coaming cap rails. Teak cabin side eye-brow. Custom cast stainless steel “Sabre” medallion. Sureshade ATF-SG retractable cockpit sun awning. Port & starboard transom access gates to cockpit. Salt water washdown system at the bow.', 'Helm Hinged access door to starboard side deck. Volvo-Penta Autopilot w/ Joystick Driving. Volvo-Penta IPS Plus Joystick Controller on Stidd Armrest. Twin Lever Shift & Throttle Control (EVC-E) w/ Single Lever & Cruise Control Software. Triple windshield wipers w/ multiple speed settings. Windshield washers plumbed from the fresh water system. Kahlenberg dual chrome trumpet horn w/ the compressor. Ritchie Compass. Switch controls for horn, running lights, anchor light, engine room blowers, & bilge pumps. Custom teak steering wheel w/ tilt helm & Sabre logo. Separate shower stall w/ clear acrylic divider. Custom tile in head & shower sole. Opening portlight to side deck. Private access from guest stateroom. Dupont Corian countertop w/ semi-recessed sink & faucet. Vanity cabinet below sink. Large wood-framed mirror over vanity. Inside of door mirrored. Stainless steel towel bars. Ventilation fan.', 'Master Stateroom Spacious 76”x80” king island berth w/ 10″ mattress & inlaid headboard. (6) Fixed hull ports w/ shades (3-port & 3-stbd.). Base of bed incorporates drawers & storage. Nightstands w/ drawers at both sides of bed. (2) Cedar-lined hanging lockers w/ shelves aft of bed. 50” HD LED TV(2) Washer & Dryer in vestibule', 'Engines, Drive Train, Engine Room Twin Volvo-Penta IPS 950 inboard propulsion systems w/ 24v electric shift transmissions & NiBrAl P-series duoprops - Tier III emission certified. (654 hours 9/25). Pleasure craft rated Volvo Penta D11, 725mhp @ 2500rpm engines. Integrated freshwater heat exchanger cooling system. Dual alternators per engine (4 total). Dynamic Positioning System (DPS). Active Corrosion Protection system (ACP). Volvo-Penta Clear Wake Exhaust bypass system (EVC controlled). Groco raw water intake strainers & safety sea valves. Oil change system for engines; pod drives; & generator.\xa0 Engine room ventilation system 24v. Engine room intake mist-eliminating ducts on cabin house sides w/ stainless steel grilles. Gloss white engine room. Gloss white painted engines. Mylar-faced foam noise barrier.', 'Fuel System Two (2) 400 USG Diesel fuel tanks Two (2) 10µ Racor dual max 1000 turbine fuel filters. Two (2) 2” Diesel stainless steel deck fill plates (1- port & 1- stbd.). Fuel level indicator at helm\xa0 Sight Guages on Fuel Tanks', 'Waste Disposal Holding tank w/ 100 gal. capacity. Freshwater marine sanitation devices w/ white ceramic bowls. Diaphragm pump on holding tank to overboard remote electrically actuated sea valve.', 'Fresh Water System Water capacity approx. 230 gals. 20 gal. 240V hot water heater. \xa0240VAC Headhunter Mach5 primary pump on hot & cold water pressure system. \xa024VDC secondary backup freshwater pump. Filters on freshwater pump system & shore water inlet. Fresh water spigot in engine room & in anchor locker.', 'Electrical Systems240/120VAC ELECTRICAL SYSTEM Twin 240/120 VAC 50Amp AC shore power system. (2) 85 ft. Glendinning cord reels aft. Isolation transformer w/ each standard shore power service. 21.5kW Onan generator w/ sound enclosure. (806 hrs 9/2025) Automatic AC switching system for shore & generator power. Mastervolt 3.5kW high output inverter w/ 120 Amp DC charger for ships batteries. 120V outlets in each cabin & one in engine room -All accessible 120VAC outlets GFCI protected. 12 Amp (24vDC) battery charger for engine start batteries. 10 Amp (12vDC) battery charger for generator start battery. 120/240VAC distribution panels in engine room & adjacent to helm.24VDC ELECTRICAL SYSTEM Dedicated 24vDC, Lifeline AGM 3100 engine starting battery banks for each engine (2-12volt batteries/engine). Dedicated 24vDC, 800Ah AGM deep cycle ship\'s service battery bank (8-6volt batteries). AGM Group 34, 12vDC generator start battery. Dedicated 24VDC battery charger for engine battery banks.NMEA2000 NETWORK SYSTEM Fully networked electrical system w/ onboard WiFi & digital switching. (CZONE) Network monitoring of systems. Network control of AC & DC electrical circuits. Backup/override of all network circuit faults. Modes of Operation – single push button activation of boatwide circuits. Two (2) iPad Air2 9.7" with Launch Ports for wireless control of network systems. (1) at mate’s settee, & (1) in master stateroom. Fixed network display in engine room. Parallel NMEA 2000 backbone for dealer/OEM-installed navigational electronics network', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['This boat is in very good condition it is fairly fuel efficient. averaging a gal per mile. The 1000 hour service has been completed and the bottom was recently painted. The generator is a Cummins/Onan 8 Kw with 2400 hours 1000 hour service was done in 2020 the generator has a Racor 500 fuel filter. The engines have Dual Racor 900 fuel filtersThe layout is designed well a center line queen bed up front The head is on the port side and a set of bunk beds on the starboard side. There is 2 zone A/C there is an ice machine \xa0a mini refrigerator on the bridge. \xa0Engine access to check and do basic maintenance is from the cockpit The salon floor does come up for major work.\xa0There is a dingywindlassoil change systemGarmin 5212 touch screen chart plotter/depth sounder/radarGarmin 48 mile color radarStec auto pilottrim tabsVHF radioSatellite TV system for dish or direct TV2x Garmin stereo\xa0Spot lightRupp 24Ft out riggersNew help and seat covers 2022New Stamoid enclosure 2019Cockpit live well, Cockpit engine access door, cockpit refrigerator, Cockpit rocket launcher']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['This boat just received a major makeover from waterline up! \xa04 Step Hull and topside 4/2025!\xa0New deck paint and covering boards as well as all hardware for deck changed out for stainless. 3/2025!Fresh 300hr service $2800...Internal and External Zincs, Impellers, Full engine Service, New drive shaft seals, upper seals and o-rings, Trim tab zincs, Fuel separators, plugs, green elements, tilt assembly replaced port engine, cap seals both engines. \xa0All three tanks replaced!31 Contender with newer Garmin, new combing pads and upholstery on 80 percent of the boat. \xa0Two man buggy seat with new upholstery, Open Array Garmin xHD2, Twin Yamaha 2015 250 XA Motors with just over 500hrs, Lenco Trim tabs and more. \xa0The most sought after fishing hull ever made. \xa0Make an offer today! \xa0Easy to see in Stuart FL.Rule Super Switch Float SwitchReseal hatches\xa0Remove, prep and install new gasket on aft bait well, port aft storage compartment and anchor locker.Remove and replace bi-color pop up navigation. Direct replacement light is smaller, had to fabricate mounting plate. Float switch for aft bilge pump bad. Provides standard Class D Digital Selective Calling (DSC) functionality (distress calling and direct calling with user programmed Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI). And you\'ll enjoy high-quality entertainment with more than 150 channels of SiriusXM satellite radio. \xa0S/N- 640005037Radio ID#EXINDD8NShakespeare Galaxy AM/FM Antenna, 8\' - 5235-XTShakespeare Galaxy 8\' VHF antenna - 5225-XT - 8\' long with 6db gainGarmin VHF 210 Marine Radio P/N- 010-01751-00 - \xa0Communication and situational awareness are critical on the water. The fixed-mount VHF 210 is designed to complement the latest GPSMAP chartplotters and MFDs. Easy to install and use, just plug and play via the NMEA 2000® network to compatible Garmin chartplotters and MFDs. Provides standard Class D Digital Selective Calling (DSC) functionality (distress calling and direct calling with user programmed Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI). With 25W transmit power, the VHF 210 gives all fishermen, sailors and cruisers confidence at their fingertips in anemergency situation and may improve their chances of a rapid rescue. \xa0S/N-63A000747Replace existing Furuno MFD and Icom VHF and add a CHIRP transducerGarmin GPSMAP 8616xsv - 010-02093-03 - Serious sport fishermen, cruisers, sailors and sail racers demand serious equipment. The easy-to-use, easy-to-install GPSMAP 8616xsv chartplotter/sonar combo delivers MFD performance in a combo-size package. It features a 16” full HD IPS touchscreen display for wider viewing angles, superior clarity and sunlight readability, even with polarized sunglasses. Multiple displays can be flat mounted edge-to-edge to create a sleek glass helm look or can be mounted flush. \xa0The GPSMAP 8616xsv chartplotter has a premium-performance processor that enables fast map drawing, superior networking, video distribution and more. Built-in Wi-Fi technology lets you pair with the free ActiveCaptain app for access to OneChart, smart notifications¹, Garmin Quickdraw™ community data and more. You can also control video streaming from our GC™ 100 wireless camera and VIRB action cameras. In addition, built-in ANT wireless technology connects you directly to our quatix marine watch, gWind Wireless 2 transducer and wireless remote controls. \xa0S/N- 5T5006155Remove existing Furuno NavNet MFD, Fusion stereo and Icom VHF from main dash panel(Fusion to be reinstalled), including all associated wires and cabling;Remove existing GPS antenna, VHF and FM antenna from T-Top;Remove existing VHF speaker from T-Top;Fabrication and installation of new dash panel in helm;Installation of new Garmin 8616 in dash with connection to power;Installation of NMEA backbone with connection to MFD and power;Installation of Fusion head unit and VHF radio in dash with connection to power and NMEA BB;Installation of new active VHF active speaker on T-top with connection to VHF radio as required;Installation of GXM54 on T-Top in same location as prior GPS antenna with connection to power, 8616 and Fusion;Installation of new VHF antenna and FM antenna on T-top with connection to Fusion and VHF as required;Installation of B175M on hull of vessel with connection to 8616xsv;Update SW and customer orientation.', 'Manufacturers DescriptionA proven tournament winner, the Contender 31 Open is abrawny, top-quality fisherman whose meticulous finish andhigh-performance capabilities placed her in the forefront of largecenter console fishing machines. The high-tech hull is vacuumbagged and cored above the waterline with wide reverse chinesand two lifting strakes per side to provide a dry ride. A single levelcockpit makes the Contender an easier boat to move aroundthan those center consoles with larger consoles. Features includean integrated dive platform with ladder, two 40-gallon livewells,transom door, deluxe leaning post with rod holders and tacklecenter, in-deck fish boxes (two fully lined 400-qt. boxes forward,two 225-qt. boxes aft), recessed bow rails, raw-water washdown,gunnel rod holders, cockpit rod storage, recessed trim tabs, walk-inconsole with marine head, cockpit bolsters and an anchor locker.Note optional fuel capacity to 400 gallons.\xa0A fast ride inthe most challenging conditions, the Contender 31 will reach over45 knots top with twin 250hp Yamaha outboards.', 'listingThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.']

AdditionalDetailDescription: ['DescriptionThe 2007 52 Viking Sport Tower has many upgrades and features. She is the only 52 Viking on the market with a gyro Sea Keeper 9, which was added in 2018 by Tri Seas Stabilizers. She is powered by MAN 1550 HP Common Rail engines and will easily cruise at 32-33 knots.\xa0A few of her recent upgrades include: Electronics, Full Paint Job, Upgraded Water Maker, Bow Thruster, Teak Deck, - *NEW Siren Marine with Satellite tracking, Garmin Reactor 40 autopilot,3 Garmin IP cameras in engine room, and much more.\xa0', 'Vessel AccommodationsAvalon features a two-stateroom, two-head layout. As you walk forward and enter the helm station, a spacious air-conditioned area surrounds you with an abundance of space for entertaining. From there, you enter the salon door on the starboard side and are introduced to the gracious salon area and galley. The master stateroom is forward with a centerline queen berth and en-suite head. The guest stateroom is located to port and features overhead bunks. GeneralBoatDescription: ['Rare DIESEL Volvo D4 300HPFor all those who love the sea, the Leader 30 brightens outings with family and friends With her sporty hull and elongated profile, she features excellent performance and seakeeping abilities, all while benefiting from the latest innovations. Perfect for day trips, the Leader 30 cleverly combines a bright interior, comfort and performance. With her luxurious contemporary design, the cockpit offers a carefully studied layout for enhanced comfort and quality of life on board. With her high quality fit and finish, the Leader 30 features an elegant interior, with bulkheads in (optional) Straight-Grain Walnut, (optional) lacquer finish on furniture, a large starboard-side hanging locker, and copious storage (optional wall cabinets).\xa0 Last but not least, the saloon transforms into a double berth.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['This boat is professionally maintained and looked after by a full time captain.\xa0 Service records for all recent service including flywheels available.\xa0 Owner takes incredibly good care of this boat.The 430 Sport Yacht combines outboard power and Intrepid\'s unique hull design to accommodate the needs and desires of serious fishermen, as well as pleasure boating passengers. A luxurious sense of space meets unmatched performance rarely found in boats of this size. The helm boasts commanding views and a pop-up console with the latest flat-screen electronics. An optional power sunroof overlooks wraparound club-style seating that facilitates comfortable interaction between skipper and crew. Additional features include custom hull color, underwater lighting, icemaker, audio-video systems, air-conditioning, power helm seating, and anchor windlass with washdown spigot. During the day, the cabin floods with natural sunlight, and the amenities are so complete that a couple could blissfully hit the islands for a week aboard this boat. And the 430 Sport Yacht serves equally as well as a racy, big water dayboat for short hops, entertaining, or a casual day on the bay. This is pure boating pleasure from the smooth, powerful ride to its state-of-the-art accommodations, the 430 Sport Yacht blends luxurious space, well thought out efficiency and peace of mind to create the best boat-owning experience on the water. Only Intrepid could give you a sport yacht that does so much so well. 2016 Intrepid 430 Sport Yacht Dark Blue Hullside with White Boot Stripe.  Triple 350 Yamaha engines with 700 hours, engines painted White with fresh flywheel service. Fiberglass Top, Side Door Swing in, Bow Thruster AC in Cabin and at Helm, Engine Flush System, Underwater Lights, Bottom Paint, All New 2x Garmin GPS/Plotter/Sounder, Digital Depth, Autopilot, VHF, Horn, Satellite TV, Fusion Stereo. with JL Audio Speakers.  Recent 100 Hour Service COMPLETED PLUS NEW FLYWHEELS!\xa0\xa0']

of U.S. boat builders would certainly include the Intrepid brand at or near the top of the list. Intrepids are all about quality, and the 430 Sport Yacht—introduced in 2009—is a tour-de-force of American boat building excellence. With her shapely lines and versatile deck layout, few boats can match the 430’s aura of luxury and sophistication. Built on a foam-cored, single-step hull with a slender 12\'8" beam, the 430SY combines outboard power and Intrepid’s unique hull design to meet the needs of serious fishermen and cruising families alike. The cockpit can be fitted with a wide range of factory bait stations, livewells, and fish boxes, etc. A large L-shaped lounge seat to port and removable bench seat aft provide comfortable seating for several passengers, and the 430’s well-appointed cabin features a separate aft cabin with queen bed in addition to a stand-up head with stall shower, compact galley with microwave, and forward settee seating that converts to a V-berth. Note the stylish hullside windows, hardtop sunroof, and mirror-smooth gelcoat. Triple Yamaha F350 outboards cruise the Intrepid 430SY at 30 knots (high 40s top).', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. GeneralBoatDescription: ['Triple 350 Yamaha engines with 700 hours, engines painted White.\xa0 Flywheel and engine service completed 7/2023. 2016 Intrepid 430 SportYacht Dark Blue Hullside with White Boot Stripe. Fiberglass Top, Side Door Swing in, Bow Thruster AC in Cabin and at Helm, Engine Flush System, Underwater Lights, Bottom Paint, All New 2x Garmin GPS/Plotter/Sounder, Digital Depth, Autopilot, VHF, Horn, Satellite TV, Fusion Stereo. with JL Audio Speakers.\xa0\xa0']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Features Transom Door Dive Platforms Tinned Wiring Navigation Lights Auto Bilge Pump (3) Digital 12v Breaker Panel Control System Guttered Cockpit Hatches with Self Bailing Cockpit PVC Foam Core Vacuum-bagged Non-woven Multi-directional and Uni-directional Fibers all Hand Laid Deck and Springline Cleats Bow Eye Wraparound Plexiglas Windscreen Integral Motor Bracket Non-Skid Deck and Gunwales Aluminum Fuel Tank Heavy Duty Vinyl Rubrail Trim Tabs Pressurized Fresh Water System Insulated Fishbox Starboard Aft with Thru Transom Ball Valve and Macerator Raw Water Washdown Dockside Fresh Water Inlet Shore Power with Battery Charger Plexi Trim Package Folding Swim Ladder Forward Recessed Deck Skylight 430 Helm Station with Electric Actuated Electronics Pod Electric Head Macerator for Holding Tank Large Private Head Compartment with Separate Shower Galley with Sink and Microwave Wood Veneered Cabinetry Electric Hot Water Heater Custom Helm Seat Dual Pedestal Electric Queen Berth Forward Bedspreads and Pillow Shams Solid Surface Countertops Cabin Lights Large Upholstered Sofa Fold Out with Inflatable Mattress Cabin Carpet Private Stateroom aft starboard Integrated Hullside Portlights ', 'Manufacturer Provided DescriptionThe 430 Sport Yacht combines outboard power and Intrepid’s unique hull design to accommodate the needs and desires of serious fishermen, as well as pleasure boating passengers. A luxurious sense of space meets unmatched performance rarely found in boats of this size. The helm boasts commanding views and a pop-up console with the latest flat-screen electronics. An optional power sunroof overlooks wraparound club-style seating that facilitates comfortable interaction between skipper and crew. Additional features include custom hull color, underwater lighting, icemaker, audio-video systems, air-conditioning, power helm seating, and anchor windlass with washdown spigot. During the day, the cabin floods with natural sunlight, and the amenities are so complete that a couple could blissfully hit the islands for a week aboard this boat. And the 430 Sport Yacht serves equally as well as a racy, big water dayboat for short hops, entertaining, or a casual day on the bay. This is pure boating pleasure…from the smooth, powerful ride to its state-of-the-art accommodations, the 430 Sport Yacht blends luxurious space, well thought out efficiency and peace of mind to create the best boat-owning experience on the water. Only Intrepid could give you a sport yacht that does so much so well.', 'Key FeaturesAccommodations \xa0  Double Berth Forward Aft to Starboard is single \xa0Private Berth Across is single seat Kenyon single burner stove top Fitrifrigo Refregerator\xa0 aft to Port is walk in Head with separate stall shower Jensen TV\xa0 Wood Veneer Cabinetry throughout Wood Flooring in Cabin and Bath Sold Solid Surface Counter Top Bedspreads and custom decor  Electronics  2 Garmin GPS 8400 Series Garmin \xa0XHD2 Open Array Radar Garmin Autopilot Garmin Transducer Zipwake Trim Tabs Icom VHH Radio Yamaha Engine Display\xa0 Ritchie Compass Bow Thruster\xa0 ACR Search Light Fusion Stereo\xa0 Tracvision TV3 Sat TV 4 JL Audio 8" Speakers\xa0 2 JL Audio 7.7 Speakers\xa0  Deck \xa0  Dark Blue Imron Hullsides White Boot Stripe White Painted Imron Engines Side door swing in with fold out ladder Swim Ladder on transom Cockpit Coaming Bolsters Removable Rear Bench Seat Dockside Fresh Water Inlet Custom Handrails on Forward Deck  Mechanical \xa0  Shore Power With Battery Charger 2 x 30 Amp Bow Thruster Windlass with SS Bruce Plough Anchor Fischer Panda \xa0Diesel Generator Electric Hot Water Heater Triple engine Flush System Pressurized Fresh Water Electric Head with Macerator for Holding tank Fresh Water Supply to Electric Head Air Conditioning in Cabin and cockpit ', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. AdditionalDetailDescription: ['V37V-37 Balanced Attack Hitting the sweet spot in the V Series lineup, the V-37 shines as a versatile coastal or offshore fish-raising thoroughbred with the legs to run long distances powered by triple yamaha outboards.', 'OverviewPerformance needs vary depending on region, fishing preferences, targeted species and other factors. With that in mind, we offer five different power choices: triple Mercury Verado 300s, 400s or 450Rs, triple Yamaha 300s or twin Yamaha 425s. Ease of operation and comfort aboard are high priorities. Each engine installation can be equipped with joystick helm control featuring GPS station-keeping. The V-37 has been designed and engineered for a Seakeeper SK 3, which is mounted in the stringer grid and accessed through a gasketed, tightly sealed deck hatch.  The V-37 can be outfitted with an aft mezzanine seating module with armrests, tackle storage and an insulated cooler (or optional live well) under the seat. And she\'s loaded with lockers, compartments and hardware that maximize storage while maintaining the boat\'s 360-degree accessibility. For instance, the standard lounge that\'s integrated into the forward console holds a cooler and dry storage, and the GG Schmitt transom seats can be flipped up and out of the way when it\'s time to fish.', 'SpecsLength 36’ 9" Beam 10\' 0" Draft Engines Up 28" Draft Engines Down 41" Weight (half load) 14,643 lbs. Weight (full load) 16,623 lbs. Deadrise 24 deg. Fuel Capacity 470 gal. Fresh Water 39 gal. Waste 12 gal. Max Engine HP 1,350 HP Live Well 56 gal.', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['2022 Scout 330 LXFWhy wait 18 months for a new Scout 330 costing over $600K. When you can Drive this practically new one, out Tomorrow!! With 17 months left of full warranty. Located in North Miami FL. Call for additional information or to schedule an easy "any day" appointment. Twin Mercury 400 Verado\'s JPO (Joystick) with only 45 hours. Like new condition with a fresh detail. Barely used, never kept in the water overnight. Never fished, used as Real-estate touring boat on the ICW. Stored on a lift behind the owners house with a full boat cover, and Diamond Tech Ceramic Hull Coated inside and out!. Full Hull Color Midnight Blue. Dual Garmin Display 8612 XVS. Transducer. Underwater Lights. Electric fiberglass sun shade. Cranking outriggers. 12V Air Conditioned Cabin Sleeps 2, Full head/shower/sink . Lumitec light Bar. Windshield Wiper. Bow rod/cup holder. Electric fwd dinette table. The Scout 330 LXF is a luxurious and high-performance center console boat that is designed for both serious fishing and comfortable cruising. With a length of 33 feet and a beam of 10 feet, the 330 LXF offers plenty of space for both diving,fishing and entertaining.The 330 LXF is powered by twin Mercury 400 Verado outboard engines, which provide plenty of power and speed for any adventure on the water. The boat\'s advanced hull design and wide beam make it incredibly stable and seaworthy, allowing it to handle even the roughest offshore conditions with ease.The cockpit of the 330 LXF is designed with the serious angler in mind, with ample rod storage,livewell, and multiple large fish boxes. The boat\'s T-top provides plenty of shade and protection from the elements, while the comfortable seating and advanced electronics make it easy to spend long days on the water.In addition to its fishing features, the 330 LXF also boasts luxurious amenities for comfortable cruising. The boat\'s cabin features a full head and galley, as well as comfortable sleeping accommodations for up to 2 people. The boat\'s large cockpit and bow areas are perfect for entertaining guests and enjoying the beautiful scenery.Overall, the Scout 330 LXF is an exceptional choice for boaters who want a versatile and high-performance boat that can handle any adventure on the water, whether it\'s fishing, cruising, or simply enjoying a day on the water with friends and family. With its advanced features and luxurious amenities, the 330 LXF is sure to impress even the most discerning boating enthusiasts.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['2021 Sea Hunt Gamefish 27 Forward SeatingThis white on white 27 GF has only 209 hours and is beautiful.\xa0 Features a Full boat cover, aluminum trailer. twin Garmin 12" Units Rear livewell and more.This series delivers exactly what serious fishermen demand in a sportfishing center console boat. These boats come ready to fish with standard features such as multiple insulated fishboxes and livewells, cockpit and bow bolsters, all stainless hardware and Yamaha Digital Command Link Gauges. The Gamefish 25, 27, and 30 have side entry doors, recessed trim tabs, and hydraulic steering as standard equipment as well. The cockpits are designed to have abundant room for 360° of fishing. These hulls deliver soft dry rides second to none.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['This 2022 Cobalt has been extremely well cared for and is in IMMACULATE condition!\xa0Single Mercury 300 with Only 13 HOURS!!\xa0Is up to date on it\'s service history!TRAILER INCLUDEDWindlass Anchor, swim platform, electric head, floor covering, ample storage, wireless phone charger, and so so much more!\xa0Classic luxury, with a modern twist!\xa0\xa0Meet the all-new Cobalt R6 bowrider. Cobalt Boats have long been known for their luxury, performance, and style. That legacy continues with the newly released Cobalt R6. The Cobalt R6 can be customized for your boating style. With three engine options: sterndrive, outboard, and a forward-drive option for the water sports enthusiast in the family. While the R6 is not a radical departure from Cobalt R Series boats in recent years, you will certainly appreciate the steps they? They\'ve taken to make these boats even better for you. Notable Features:Familiar body lines More robust hull design (similar to the Cobalt A29) Modern interior Increased seating 10" dual-screen Garmin displays Ergonomic helm, dash and stereo controls JL Audio speaker system Rockford Fosgate head unit, with Bluetooth Easier head access Better engine access Slightly heavier dry weight More solid ride\xa0']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['EXTERIORPerfect for both salt water and year-round lake boating, the R6 Outboard can tip its engine completely out of the water, making cooling-system drainage and maintenance simpler. Plus, we?ve combined the convenience, economy, and agility you expect with timeless Cobalt design for a striking presence and standout ride.', 'BOW STORAGEBow storage secures and organizes life vests, anchors or other equipment.', 'STAINLESS STEEL WINDSHIELD TRIMFind a polished stainless steel top surface cap to windshield frames and enjoy the brightwork look the windshield possesses—all crafted to reflect heat in the sun and be cooler to the touch.', 'SPORT TOWER WITH SUNSHADEA ridged mounted tower with stretched canvas provides good shade coverage for the cockpit. Additional pull out aft sunshade for extra coverage to rear seating. Unique top available on outboard models only.', 'INTERIOR FEATURECOBALT + GARMIN The Cobalt Glass Cockpit System is the premier multi-display solution for total helm control. The Garmin interface is fully integrated with the most pivotal handling and safety information from your Cobalt powertrain. The result is the ultimate boating experience now available with larger screens on select Cobalt models.  ', 'EXTERIOR INNOVATIONARCH WITH ROTATING SUNSHADE No need to take down your sunshade with the Arch with Rotating Sunshade. Built on our aluminum folding arch, the canvas remains up when the arch is folded down to lower positions, and the sunshade has a rigid frame for tight canvas fit and articulates as the arch is folded down, remaining flat. Gas assist cylinder or full electric actuation options make it easily operable for one person. ', "INTERIOR INNOVATIONFRESCO CHIL VINYL Finally, no more hot seats on darker colored vinyl while you're out enjoying a full day of fun on the water. This anti-bacterial, anti-fungal, mildew-resistant, and sulfide stain-resistant fabric technology keeps your vinyl a full 15-20 degrees cooler than traditional vinyl even when it's out in the sun. ", "FEATUREFENDER CLIP PACKAGE The Cobalt stainless-steel fender clips are a quick mount system installed in the deck at the perfect fender position, so the lines are always set to optimum length. When docking, simply insert the pin into the fitting and you're done. ", "STEP & PLATFORM INNOVATIONSOF-TRAC POSITIVE TRACTION MAT Dress up your swim platform with the Sof-Trac Positive Traction Mat. Gentle on swimsuits and wakeboards, you'll maintain traction even when wet. Dealer-installed kits are available for most current models with or without the Swim Step. ", 'INTERIORThe R6 Outboard delivers excitement and elegance with wraparound yacht-style seating for comfort and luxury with plenty of room for gear, and increased space and capacity for a head compartment while still maintaining its sporty performance and responsive handling.', 'InteriorHEAD COMPARTMENT Find a compartment with a deep step-down space, a tinted skylight, and a standard Porta Potti with options that include electric porcelain toilets, pump-out Porta Potti, and sink console.  LED ACCENT LIGHTING Create a rich nighttime ambiance in the cockpit and bow areas with indirect lighting hidden in interior upholstery side panels that feature RGB selectable color and LED low-power consumption.  AFT BACKREST Adjustable to 2 positions—face forward or face aft on either side of center walk-thru. Stainless-steel handles add security in rough waters all supported by a heavy-duty steel hinge mechanism.', 'Additional Units Included 2022 Venture VATB-8725 ', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.']

GeneralBoatDescription: ['Owner is moving up after a year and a half in this beautiful 40GT.\xa0 It has just 345 hours on her 2016 Diesel Volvo Engines.\xa0 This boat has been extremely well kept.\xa0 Full ceramic coating applied last summer and it shows great.\xa0 Beautiful GT Layout with full sunroof, Simrad Electronics, and a Joystick for maneuvering and docking.']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Steering SystemJoystick Control', 'Steering SystemJoystick Control', 'Manufacturer Provided DescriptionDesigned by the talented hands of Nuvolari and Lenard, the Gran Turismo 40 recreates the sport cruiser concept. A perfectly proportioned interior and superior performance make her not only eye catching but a pleasure to drive.', 'A giant step forward in the universe of sport-cruisersElegance, quality fittings, top-level finish and sensations guaranteed. The new Gran Turismo range developed by Beneteau is full of surprises. Harmonious throughout, many of the details on the new Gran Turismo 40 boat underline the balance between her strong sporting character and the type of functions you might expect for a pleasant, luxurious yet practical life on board.In creating this boat, Beneteau sought out the well-known designers Nuvolari and Lenard who have already designed several legendary craft of this type. The builder has also made use of the latest innovations from his motor boats design office, applying all the technological resources available, with a view to offering outstanding comfort and sensations, as well as exceptional performance.', 'AccommodationsIngeniously combining the protection afforded by a hard-top boat and the sensations of an open craft, the Gran Turismo 40 has a hard top which can be pushed right back. The electrically powered side glazing means that the ultra-spacious cockpit can be freed totally to accommodate up to twelve people. The conversion of the cockpit seating into immense sun-loungers increases still further the boat’s relaxation space, adding to the boat’s already generous 4m2 sunbaths with adjustable backrests up on the fore deck. No detail has been overlooked.The galley is located in the cockpit or at the stern of the boat (aft galley pack) according to preference. In this layout, the saloon has an additional seat. In a marriage of speed and style, the new Gran Turismo 40 is as pleasant to admire as she is to drive. Designed to stand out on the water, her lines are elegant accentuated by a streamlined hull and the hard-top with its carefully designed side glazing. Enhancing both visibility and comfort, Beneteau has centred the three-seater helming station. With the latest generation Air Step planing hull, this newSport Cruiser gives you driving sensations and a level of comfort whereby you can sail safely and comfortably at speeds of up to 35 knots. The Volvo Z Drive engine makes this new motor boat particularly manoeuvrable.For a wonderful entry to nautical and aquatic experiences, the vast swim platform, (1.30m deep) with motorization as an optional extra, can be lowered to just below sea level. Linking life on board and the sea, it offers features you find on great yachts. It is particularly useful for stowing the tender when sailing.The layout of the lower deck provides a feeling of space which has never been seen before on a boat of this size. Facing the spacious convertible saloon with large hull windows, a proper fully-fitted kitchen galley complements the deck kitchen. With her two cabins, and a real washroom with separate shower, the GranTurismo 40 clearly stands out for her habitability.Everything about the new Gran Turismo range invites you to explore every detail of what makes these boats different. We look forward to seeing you at the boat shows in the winter.', 'DisclaimerThe Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.', 'Steering SystemJoystick Control']

AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Steering SystemJoystick Control', 'Manufacturer Provided DescriptionThe Formula 500 Super Sport Crossover is your best choice for taking a time out on the water. Finally, a fifty-foot answer to your private escape with family and friends, combining a commanding offshore ride with unprecedented amenities and luxury. The 500 SSC offers the Formula Crossover heritage of a wide-open, single-level bowrider inviting open station-to-station wandering. From the enclosed coupe-top salon to the aft lounge bar, the 500 SSC is a true evolution and culmination of the Formula SmartZone? concept. From the full bow lounge forward to the expansive extended swim platform aft, you will find air-conditioned comfort, entertainment and innovation. A full-width motorized glass salon bulkhead allows you to choose your degree of separation or shared fun with the aft cockpit lounges and bar areas. The 500 SSC amenities below offer a respite from the outside world with a true cabin experience. A complete galley at the cabin entry stairs, the large convertible U-lounge forward, a head with Corian surfacing, vanity sink and spacious shower create a residential feel. Slip aft to the separate stateroom with queen-size berth, sofa and complete entertainment suite. The proven,\xa0 surefooted double-step FAS3Tech® hull will take your complement of guests to dinner across the bay or on far-flung offshore journeys in speed and comfort with the confidence and might of the revolutionary all-new quad Mercury V12, 600 horsepower Verado outboards. The horizons are limitless in your 500 Super Sport Crossover.', 'Manufacturer Provided DescriptionThe Formula 500 Super Sport Crossover is your best choice for taking a time out on the water. Finally, a fifty-foot answer to your private escape with family and friends, combining a commanding offshore ride with unprecedented amenities and luxury. The 500 SSC offers the Formula Crossover heritage of a wide-open, single-level bowrider inviting open station-to-station wandering. From the enclosed coupe-top salon to the aft lounge bar, the 500 SSC is a true evolution and culmination of the Formula SmartZone™ concept. From the full bow lounge forward to the expansive extended swim platform aft, you will find air-conditioned comfort, entertainment and innovation. A full-width motorized glass salon bulkhead allows you to choose your degree of separation or shared fun with the aft cockpit lounges and bar areas. The 500 SSC amenities below offer a respite from the outside world with a true cabin experience. A complete galley at the cabin entry stairs, the large convertible U-lounge forward, a head with Corian surfacing, vanity sink and spacious shower create a residential feel. Electric rear seat, Electric helm seat, Teak bow table,\xa0Twin Garmin 9” screens, Fusion stereo system. Folding arch. This Boston Whaler Dauntless 27 has only\xa057 Hours.\xa0 It features two Raymarine Axiom Hybrid Touch Screens 12".\xa0 Fusion MS-RA70NSX Stereo with JL Audio Speakers, Lenco Trim Tabs, Garmin VHF Radio, Mercury Active Trim, Fresh Water Washdown/Shower, Windlass Anchor, Helm and cushion covers, Custom Bimini designed for areas with low bridges, Port-O-Potty, Bow table, and Bow filler with cushions...and more!!!']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Manufacturer Provided DescriptionFor versatility and effortless enjoyment, the 270 Dauntless® is unrivaled. Comfort and ease start in the bow, and continue throughout with stylish finishes, accessories and options to ensure you are prepared for any adventure. At every turn, the 270 Dauntless is the epitome of capability and comfort.  Optional swim platform provides divers and swimmers with a convenient, easy-access platform. Huge, lockable storage beneath the forward lounge seat holds rods, buckets and much more. Optional integrated hardtop features rod holders to keep your fishing arsenal at hand. Optional deluxe leaning post enhances the helm seat with flip-up thigh-rise bolsters. GeneralBoatDescription: ['The Sea Ray 260 Sundeck might easily beconfused with a full-blown sportboat were it not for her broad bowarea with its lounge seating and walk-through boarding gate. The passenger-side console houses\xa0a lockable head with sink and opening port, and a well-positioned cockpit galley—or wetbar—includes a second sink as well as aninsulated cooler and faucet with pullout sprayer. An L-shapedsettee spans the transom and port side of the cockpit, and the rearsection rises to reveal the engine compartment. An extended swimplatform was standard and docking lights were a popular option.Technically, a permit is required to tow the Sea Ray 270 since her8\'10" beam slightly exceeds the legal 8\'6" width restriction. Amongseveral engine options, a single 375hp MerCruiser I/O will reach atop speed of just over 40 knots.']
AdditionalDetailDescription: ['Manufacturer Provided DescriptionOur 260 Sundeck strikes a perfect balance between style and substance, so owners and guests can have more fun. This fun boat features an encosed fiberglass head and extended swim platform with faux teak inserts. Key Features  Available in black, red, blue, burgundy, and patina two-tone or full hull color optional gel-coat finishes with Sundeck® graphics Cockpit entertainment center with sink and faucet. Forward boarding ladder in concealed anchor hatch. Large head compartment with vanity, sink, and portable head standard. Limited Lifetime Structural Warranty on hull and deck. Swim Platform w/Faux Teak Inserts Mercury Installation Quality Certification \x96 standard 2-year limited engine warranty. SmartCraft® instrumentation standard.
